text.message: Orange where are you going? I don’t wanna race you

i tried to help you red
lol you gave them no choiuce
they needed to try to settle there
me having a city is 100% your fault

ya i know, that was silly tbh
Completely unnecessary, furthermore, I asked first
And I remember that orange blocked and robbed me, right?
Still I am not kingmaking or throwing the game
big surprise you dont think its you lol
No. 8 ore and 5 brick is cray rolls I’d say
4 ore on that spot seems fime by me lol
Strategically 6 wheat is the only wheat they have
Why??? Don’t you see the map???
spare an ore for a pop?
Now you understand why the 6 wheat was the block or not yet ?
Again, you cannot trade the leader
Blue might be on 7 or 8 points
if you gave me the saem 1:1 i wouldnt have to
ya i hate it too, believe me

You can say “nope” but it still is throwing
Black wins if he gets army. He has roadplay easy

Black u need to take road
Gg in two rounds black. Trust me

i'm not even close so dont feed too hard
